overall.description: A nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city in Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves from a ground-level plaza up stairs to an elevated pedestrian walkway with views of the skyline, then descends to street level under an overpass with passing traffic. The scene features wet reflective surfaces, holographic advertisements, and dense urban architecture.

illuminated orange signage on building facade
rain-slicked reflective pavement showing neon reflections
skyscrapers with illuminated windows against night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide urban plaza at night, surrounded by towering buildings with bright neon signage. The ground is wet and reflective from recent rain. The camera moves forward through the plaza, turning right toward a staircase entrance between buildings.

events.description: entering enclosed stairwell from open plaza
emerging from dark stairs into brighter elevated area

agents.ego_description: climbing steep concrete stairs with metal railings to reach upper level

entered.detail: steep concrete stairs with metal handrails on both sides
concrete building facade with green neon reflections

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow enclosed stairwell, ascending concrete steps between tall buildings. The lighting is dim with artificial light sources from above. At the top, bright light indicates the exit to an open elevated area.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian terrace with outdoor dining and city views

slowing pace while passing food stall area

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto an elevated open-air terrace, the scene reveals a stunning view of the distant city skyline filled with neon-lit skyscrapers. The camera walks past outdoor dining areas with large umbrellas and a food stall with a prominent red sign. The wet pavement reflects the colorful lights from surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated scenic walkway overlooking traffic and monorail

monorail train passing overhead on elevated track

agents.ego_description: walking along railing overlooking the street and city traffic below, admiring the skyline views

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the elevated walkway, the camera follows a curved path with views of a monorail track overhead and traffic moving on the street below. Palm trees line the walkway edge, and the distant skyline remains visible with shifting perspectives. A monorail train passes by on the elevated track.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under overpass with neon advertisements

events.description: descending from elevated walkway to street level under overpass
futuristic sedan driving past on adjacent road

concrete divider separating pedestrian walkway from vehicle road

segments.scene_description: The camera descends to street level, entering a covered area beneath a massive concrete overpass. The environment is dominated by bright pink neon advertisements covering the walls. Vehicles drive past on the adjacent road, separated by a concrete barrier. The lighting shifts to artificial sources from the overhead structure and vibrant holographic displays.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, rain-slicked urban plaza up into an elevated terrace overlooking a neon-lit skyline. It begins by gliding across the reflective ground of a vast plaza surrounded by towering buildings and bright signage before turning right toward a staircase entrance. As the camera enters the narrow, dim concrete stairwell, the environment closes in, ascending through artificial light toward a bright exit at the top. The scene then opens onto an expansive open-air terrace, where the view expands to reveal a distant horizon of glowing skyscrapers. Finally, the camera moves past outdoor dining umbrellas and a red-signed food stall, with the wet pavement mirroring the vibrant colors of the surrounding city.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open, elevated walkway overlooking a futuristic skyline to the enclosed, neon-drenched atmosphere of a street-level underpass. It begins by gliding along a curved pedestrian path lined with palm trees, where a monorail train streaks across an overhead track above the distant city horizon. As the camera descends from this height, the open sky vanishes and the perspective shifts toward the ground, entering a covered area beneath a massive concrete overpass. The scene then transforms into a corridor of artificial light, where the ambient glow is replaced by vibrant pink neon advertisements and holographic displays reflecting off the urban surfaces. Finally, the movement settles at street level, passing alongside a concrete barrier as vehicles drive by in the shadow of the overhead structure.
